spec_match.rationale: Native LCP and soft-navigation observers remain the source of truth when supported, and simulated soft-navigation log entries are limited to fallback mode.

interactive.rationale: Route buttons update the mini SPA and populate the LCP table or fallback stream.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The demo continues to explain LCP reset boundaries per soft navigation.

edge_cases.rationale: The page independently detects soft-navigation and LCP support and labels unsupported paths without duplicating native entries.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Raw color literals were replaced with design-token color mixes.

summary: The raw stream no longer receives simulated soft-navigation entries on supported browsers, the ChromeStatus link was added, and touched styles now use shared tokens.
